title: elymus × dorei
intro: Elymus × dorei, a hybrid of the Elymus caninus and Elymus junceus plants, is a type of grass that is commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and soothe irritated mucous membranes. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions, including indigestion, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Elymus × dorei can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
